dataList.title: LCE Recovers The Ring's Artwork - Corporist Piece
dataList.behaveDesc: Who will go and take it?
successDesc:
{0} reaches into the pile and pulls out something fashioned of bones and musculature.

<This is...>

A broken artwork, by the looks of it—likely the work of Corporists.

Perhaps setting the artwork on a pedestal will return to it the value it once held.
failureDesc:
{0} reaches into the pile and grabs something fashioned of bones and musculature.

<Ah... W-watch out!>

{0} quickly pulls their hand away and retreats a safe distance.

... It was close—for a moment, the samples stacked on top threatened to collapse and bury the Sinners under them.

It hardly seems worth risking harm just to take something we're not even sure will prove useful.

dataList.title: Gallery of the Ring's School of Fauvism
successDesc:
{0} takes the pedestal.

The gallery remains serene, its stillness broken only by the gentle, calming music.
failureDesc:
"The gallery isn't open yet. What business do you have here?!"

A ringing shout breaks through the gentle music, flooding the hall with its echo.

... It seems we have no choice but to fight.

dataList.title: Quiet Corridor of the Middle
successDesc:
{0} reaches out to take the knuckle.

After painstakingly uncurling each finger, {0} finally manages to pull free the knuckle etched with the symbol of the Middle.
failureDesc:
{0} reaches out to take the knuckle.

But as {0} tries to uncurl each finger, the display cases start to quake and rattle.

"Huh...? Watch out...!"

The other Sinners' warning cuts off as the shelves give way and crash down over {0}.

... Looks like the knuckle was rigged to bring down the shelves if the fingers are not uncurled in the right order.

The knuckle is now lost beneath the debris, buried too deep to retrieve.
